topIssues: Frame 2 & 3: The main table UI is completely static between these frames. Only the bottom status bar text changes, which fails to visually demonstrate the 'report' action actually occurring in the interface.
Frame 1-3: Low contrast on the gray text elements (such as 'Revenue / variance', 'V1', and the subtitle) against the dark background, making them hard to read quickly.
Frame 2: The AI is 'reading' a row (Net income / variance) that has no actual value (represented by a dash '-'), making the narrative of 'reporting a value' confusing to the viewer.
fixSuggestions: Add a temporary visual confirmation in the main UI during Frame 3, such as a subtle green flash, a checkmark icon next to the 'V1' label, or a toast notification confirming the value was successfully reported.
Increase the font weight or brightness of the gray text labels to meet WCAG AA contrast guidelines for dark mode.
Use a row with an actual numerical value (like 'Gross profit / variance' at +21.7%) for the walkthrough to make the 'read and report' action logical and satisfying.
